_comment: WIN-DLG-003 -- in-suite Office file picker (Save As / Open fallback sheet). Composition-PINNING
contract (check-windows-file-flow-contract.py shape: comment-stripped literal anchors + a
message-box ledger + read-only cross-references) over the real OfficeFilePicker fallback
(fpicker/source/office/iodlg.cxx + fpicker/uiconfig/ui/explorerfiledialog.ui + foldernamedialog.ui).
Design 08-dialogs.md 8.3.1 explicitly assigns this in-suite picker and its pixels to WIN-DLG-003.
WIN-SYS-001 (file-flow-policy.json) already closes the OS-owned win32 IFileDialog delegation, the
SystemFilePicker->OfficeFilePicker seam, and the filedlghelper.cxx call-site boxes -- NONE of that
is redone here. This row pins only the fallback picker's own composition.
The .ui controls are plain stock GtkComboBoxText/GtkCheckButton/GtkButton with NO Material-specific
styling hook in source (unlike VCL_FILE_WIDGET_THEME-guarded surfaces), so there is no definition.xml
part to pin: the M-scope is binding the design 8.3 Layout & regions to the real widget ids + their
weld_* bindings, plus the save-mode label swap and the picker's OWN overwrite-confirmation box.
NON-OBVIOUS FINDING pinned as a guard: design 8.3's 'Breadcrumb row' region is backed by the plain
current_path SvtURLBox combo, NOT by breadcrumb.ui. breadcrumb.ui/Breadcrumb is used exclusively by
RemoteFilesDialog (the already native-excluded remote/WebDAV picker; 5 references there, ZERO in
iodlg.cxx/iodlgimp.cxx). Anchoring 'Breadcrumb row' to breadcrumb.ui would be a false pin -- the
breadcrumb_guard below forbids any breadcrumb reference in iodlg.cxx to keep that honest.
The undocumented extra checkboxes (readonly/extension/gpgencrypt/gpgsign/options/selection/link/
cb_preview) and the new_folder->foldernamedialog.ui flow are left UNCLAIMED (neither pinned nor
contradicted), pending the 8.3 chapter settling.
Source evidence only: runtime_verified is false throughout -- no native build, Save-As sheet pixels,
or runtime interaction are claimed. Resource identifiers (STR_*) are anchored as C++ identifiers,
never hardcoded display strings, so a localization edit does not spuriously fail the contract.
design_reference: docs/design/08-dialogs.md (8.3 Save As / Open; 8.3.1 file-flow platform delegation)

regions.note: The design 8.3 'Breadcrumb row' is the plain current_path SvtURLBox combo, NOT breadcrumb.ui (that belongs to the remote picker).

anchors.note: Save-mode branch that swaps title + confirm-button labels.
The confirm button relabels to Save in save mode.

message_boxes.note: The fallback picker's OWN overwrite-confirmation box (design 8.3 'Overwriting an existing file raises the destructive-confirmation pattern... with the safe default on Cancel'). Any outcome other than Yes aborts the write. dialog-notification-policy.csv is .ui-only and file-flow-policy.json's message_boxes are scoped to filedlghelper.cxx, so no existing registry pins this box.

breadcrumb_guard.note: breadcrumb.ui/Breadcrumb belongs to RemoteFilesDialog, not this fallback picker. If iodlg.cxx ever references breadcrumb, the 'Breadcrumb row = current_path' pin is stale and this fails closed.

picker_seam.note: The upstream SystemFilePicker->OfficeFilePicker routing boundary (WIN-SYS-001) that hands control into this fallback picker; read-only confirmation it hasn't drifted, never re-registered.

cross_references.note: The in-suite picker collects input; already registered as native-exclusion (KeepModal); pinned read-only, not re-registered.
The new-folder name-entry sub-dialog; already registered as native-exclusion (KeepModal); pinned read-only, not re-registered.
